html:
2026-0557
2026-06-04PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 302, Northwest TerritoriesProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 302 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Northwest Territories with respect to the storm surge that occurred in Northwest Territories in August 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 302, Northwest Territories
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 302 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Northwest Territories with respect to the storm surge that occurred in Northwest Territories in August 2025.
